nasb.text: They married those from the families of the sons of Manasseh the son of Joseph, and their inheritance remained with the tribe of the family of their father.

esv.text: They were married into the clans of the people of Manasseh the son of Joseph, and their inheritance remained in the tribe of their father’s clan.

cnv.text: 她們嫁給了約瑟的兒子瑪拿西子孫家族的人作妻子；她們的產業仍然留在自己的支派中。

ccb.text: 即约瑟之子玛拿西支派的人。这样，她们的产业仍留在本支派中。
